name: team-skills-platform
description: Open-source role-based Team Skills Platform for AI delivery workflows. Includes Tech Lead orchestration, 27 specialist agents, ECC harness skeleton, 195+ skills, commands, rules, and hooks for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Role-based AI delivery workflows with Tech Lead orchestration and 27 specialist agents.
interface.longDescription: 通过 Tech Lead 编排与专业角色分工统一需求、方案、研发、测试和发布协作，并提供 ECC 风格的 specialist agents、commands、rules、hooks skeleton 与前端治理能力。
defaultPrompt: Let Tech Lead help me break down a new requirement.
Use Planner and Frontend Engineer to plan a UI redesign.
Use Code Reviewer and Security Reviewer to audit the current implementation.
